_doc: Policy-change dates per wallet (sizing %, bands, deviation — NOT base_usd drift). Gate reads this for config-stability. Optimizer Apply must append here.

Rin2x.change: sizing 3%->2.5% — 3% overshot the $600 pool (15% capital skips). $600 = Harry real go-live capital, so config must fit it. Rule: capital skips persist by Jul 16-17 -> 2%.
